case_title: LUIS GOMEZ VS. M SHALIMAAR INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOMEZ, LUIS AS TO DEFENDANT M SHALIMAAR INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA SHALIMAR RESTAURANT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOMEZ, LUIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT M SHALIMAAR INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA SHALIMAR RESTAURANT $44,885.43 PRINCIPAL, $1,053.50 INTEREST, $335.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $46,273.93, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOMEZ, LUIS AS TO DEFENDANT M SHALIMAAR INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA SHALIMAR RESTAURANT
